key_themes: Record Q1 2026 deliveries with 98%+ YoY growth
Strong pre-orders and momentum for new models like ES9 and Onvo L series
Battery swapping technology and ecosystem advantages
Analyst buy ratings, upgrades, and 40-50% growth guidance
summary: NIO is generating strongly positive sentiment after reporting its first-ever GAAP quarterly profit of $40.4M in Q1 2026 alongside record deliveries of 83,465 vehicles (up 98.3% YoY), with March alone surging 136%.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/nio-jumps-6-first-ever-192230380.html)[[2]](https://ir.nio.com/news-events/news-releases/) Investors are excited by exceeding expectations on new models like the ES9 (strong pre-sales driving additional orders), continued battery swap innovation that mitigates user battery risks, and reaffirmed 40-50% delivery growth guidance for the year. While Q2 may see pressure amid competition, analyst buy ratings, technical bullish patterns, and the turnaround from heavy losses to profitability have driven stock momentum and optimism.[[3]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/NIO)
sources: 15+ news articles and IR releases (Yahoo Finance, Motley Fool, CNevpost, NIO IR), 20+ recent X posts from investors and analysts (semantic + keyword searches since 2026)
